Localization.Description: Possible creation of a remote shell using PowerShell functions System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeServerStream and System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeClientStream designed to create a server on user's host (bind shell) and to connect to a server on attacker's host (reverse shell). This may indicate the use of Fuegoshell one-liners.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Using PowerShell, user {object.account.name} created a bind-shell connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {event_src.host}
Using PowerShell, user {object.account.name} created a reverse-shell connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} from host {event_src.host}
